name: Linkage
description_short: Linkage Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering auto loans, personal loans, recreational financing, and online banking services with competitive rates.
description_long:
Linkage Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union, a member-owned financial institution serving consumers through direct lending and deposit services. The organization maintains a physical presence accessible by phone at (254) 754-1168 and operates an online banking platform with mobile app functionality for account management and loan applications. Their routing and transit number (311989933) confirms their status as a federally-regulated financial institution. The credit union actively monitors and alerts members about fraud risks, including spoofing scams targeting their phone number, demonstrating customer protection awareness.

Linkage Credit Union's primary offerings include auto loans starting at 4.99% APR for 72-month terms with pre-approval availability, recreational vehicle financing (RV, motorcycle, ATV/UTV, and boat loans) with competitive rates determined by application, and personal loans up to $10,000 or 10% of annual income (whichever is less) starting at 10.00% APR for up to 36 months. The credit union provides online banking enrollment and password management tools, loan payment processing capabilities, membership applications, loan refinancing options to reduce monthly payments, and a mobile banking application. Members can access quick tabs for loan applications and payment processing directly from their website.

Linkage Credit Union distinguishes itself through member-ownership structure typical of credit unions, which theoretically provides more favorable terms than traditional banks. The institution emphasizes security awareness by proactively warning members about phone spoofing fraud and clarifying that legitimate representatives will never request sensitive credentials. They offer recreational vehicle financing, a specialized product many traditional banks limit. The credit union maintains both digital and phone-based service channels, allowing member preference in account access and application submission.

Linkage Credit Union presents as a legitimate, regional credit union with standard lending products and online banking capabilities. However, the website provides minimal transparency regarding membership eligibility requirements, fee schedules, deposit account products (savings, checking, CDs), insurance offerings, or credit union charter details. Interest rate APRs are explicitly stated as subject to credit approval, meaning advertised rates may not be available to all applicants. The organization's geographic footprint and membership field of eligibility remain unstated on the website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.99% APR for 72-month terms
Auto loan refinancing to lower existing monthly payments
Pre-approval process for auto loans via phone
Recreational vehicle financing (RV, motorcycle, ATV/UTV, boat loans)
Personal loans up to $10,000 or 10% annual income with 36-month terms starting at 10.00% APR
Online banking enrollment and account login
Password reset and account recovery assistance
Mobile banking app for account management
Phone and text-based customer service at (254) 754-1168
Fraud prevention alerts and scam education for members
pros: Auto loan rates start at 4.99% APR for 72-month terms with free pre-approval available
Personal loans up to $10,000 available with terms as long as 36 months
Specialized recreational vehicle financing for RV, motorcycle, ATV/UTV, and boat purchases
Auto loan refinancing option to lower existing monthly payments
Online banking and mobile app available for 24/7 account management and loan applications
Proactive fraud prevention messaging warns members about phone spoofing scams
Member-owned credit union structure typically offers more favorable rates than traditional banks
cons: Website does not disclose membership eligibility requirements or field of eligibility criteria
No information provided about deposit products (checking, savings, CDs) or associated fees
All advertised APRs explicitly subject to credit approval, making actual availability uncertain
Personal loan maximum of $10,000 is relatively low compared to many personal loan lenders
Limited online transparency about hours of operation, physical branch locations, or contact options beyond phone number
best_for: Credit union members seeking competitive auto loan refinancing to reduce monthly payments
Consumers with recreational vehicles needing specialized financing for RV, motorcycle, boat, or ATV purchases
Borrowers qualifying for personal loans up to $10,000 for consolidation or purchase needs
Members seeking online and mobile banking convenience with traditional credit union lending products
diagnosis: Linkage Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members seeking competitive auto loans, recreational vehicle financing, or personal loans through a member-owned financial institution with online banking access. The main caveat is that membership eligibility, fee structures, deposit product details, and physical branch locations are not disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact to determine eligibility and full service capabilities.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
